1842940.name: Cryptonaut
1842940.description:
Cryptonaut is a first-person arcade-style shoot 'em up crypto-parody, where you obliterate the competition, gain massive $$$ as you make your way to the moon. But be careful, crypto investing has many pitfalls for the naive investor...

Key Features:


  • Procedurally generated glow-tastic gameplay!
  • Challenging game modes for increased replayability!
  • Classic arcade-action with permadeath and high scores!

Play the FREE demo and try out the awesome MILLION game mode!

What's NOT in the Demo:


  • More challenging achievements!
  • More trippy weapons to wield!
  • More game modes to master!
  • More enemies to obliterate!
  • More levels to zone-out to!
  • More bosses to dominate!
  • More crypto hilarity!

The ONLY crypto-game on Steam!
